description: The creation date of the list.
name: sigsci-fetch-events

outputs.description: The unique ID of the event. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Timestamp date
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.ID

outputs.description: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Source The source information, for example, “IP”. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.RemoteCountryCode
outputs.name: The timestamp of the event (RFC3339 format).

outputs.description: The country code. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.RemoteHostname The remote hostname.
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: An array of user agents. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Action If “flagged”, the IP address is flagged and subsequent malicious requests will be blocked. If “info”, the IP address is flagged and subsequent requests will be logged.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.UserAgents

outputs.description: The reason the event was triggered. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.RequestCount The total number of requests.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Reasons

outputs.description: The total number of tags. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Window The time window (in seconds) when the items were detected.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.TagCount
